assertions.description: Element.prototype.startViewTransition is exposed, not just document.startViewTransition.
document.startViewTransition remains exposed for document-scoped transitions.
Calling element.startViewTransition returns a ViewTransition object with promise properties.
A scoped ViewTransition exposes a setlike types object for interrogating transition types.
assertions.test: (()=>{try{const e=document.createElement('div');document.body.appendChild(e);const t=e.startViewTransition(()=>{});const ok=t.types&&typeof t.types.add==='function'&&typeof t.types.has==='function'&&typeof t.types.delete==='function';try{t.skipTransition();}catch(_){}e.remove();return ok;}catch(_){return false;}})()

assertions.description: view-transition-class is recognized as the class-like selector hook for transition pseudos.
view-transition-group is recognized for nesting element-scoped transition pseudo trees.
